overall.description: A cinematic drone shot captures a historic lighthouse perched atop a rocky cliff overlooking calm waters, enveloped in dense fog. The scene is static and atmospheric, with mist obscuring the forested coastline in the background.

agents.ego_description: hovering steadily over the water, maintaining a static view of the lighthouse and foggy coastline

entered.detail: tall black and white striped lighthouse tower atop the cliff
steep dark rock face rising directly from the water
still dark water reflecting the cliff and overcast sky
distant tree-covered hills obscured by thick fog
low-lying fog hovering over the water and coastline

segments.scene_description: The drone hovers over calm waters facing a rocky cliff with a historic lighthouse. Dense fog shrouds the distant forested coastline, creating a moody, isolated atmosphere. The scene remains static with no visible movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a historic lighthouse perched atop a rocky cliff overlooking calm waters. It begins with the camera hovering over the still sea, facing the imposing stone structure as it stands against a moody sky. As the gaze lingers, dense fog heavily shrouds the distant forested coastline, deepening the sense of isolation. The scene remains suspended in this quiet stillness, with the mist continuing to obscure the horizon and wrap the landscape in a thick, gray veil.
